message:
style(cli): relocate misplaced doc comment and consolidate use imports in run_log

Move the "Map free percentage to pressure level string" doc comment from
run_log() (where it was misplaced during the log command addition) back
to pressure_level_str() where it belongs. Consolidate the two separate
`use io::{Seek,BufRead}` imports into a single grouped import at the
top of the follow-mode block.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
